value.rationale: Context Compaction is a feature within Google's agentic coding product (Antigravity 2.0) that automatically manages the context window during long agent runs by compacting conversation history to stay within token limits. This is a partial capability within agentic-coding (it handles only one aspect — context window management) and also relates to agent-memory in that it governs how prior session content is retained and summarized across turns. The parent product is google-antigravity-2-0 based on provider (Google) and capability context.
